operator_guidance.stop_line: This ledger records only the current no-answer pause state. It records no operator answer, records no approval, keeps the active decision at hold_no_runtime_mutation, and does not authorize design-only wiring, bounded activation tests, runtime adapter registration or enablement, IRC/session-manager mutation, cross-project autorouting, customer/public delivery, dispatch, reputation, payment/production claims, exact GPS/raw metadata release, private-context release, authority claims, worker-copyable doctrine, or stopped-project integration.
